# TiledStyleDefinition.HasPartialDecode property

`true` when the record's trailing variant-specific bytes (additional piece handles, sub-rects) were not fully decoded by the current [`Parse`](./Parse.md) implementation. Consumers that need the full composition should treat the absent fields as "unknown" rather than "zero".

```csharp
public bool HasPartialDecode { get; set; }
```
